title: Canon PC Wallpapers [Cobblemon]
description: This addon adds a variety of wallpapers from Generations 3 through 9 to Cobblemon, via the new Wallpaper Addon Systems.
body:
This addon adds a variety of wallpapers from Generations 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, and 9 to Cobblemon, via the new Wallpaper Addon Systems.

Generations 3, 4, and 5 take the original game assets and expand them to fit the Cobblemon resolution.
Generations 6/7, 8, and 9 take the original designs and recreate them within the Cobblemon resolution.

Represented games include Ruby/Sapphire, Emerald, FireRed/LeafGreen, Pokémon Colesseum, Pokémon Box Ruby & Sapphire, Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness, Diamond/Pearl, Platinum, HeartGold/SoulSilver, Black/White, Black2/White2, X/Y, Omega Ruby/Alpha Sapphire, Let's Go Pikachu/Let's Go Eevee, Sword/Shield, Scarlet/Violet, and Pokémon Bank.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/8E6LQMRWs3o" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Not all wallpapers are finished, and assets may be refined over time.
